# murmur — Distributed P2P Collaboration Library

- purpose: P2P collaboration library with CRDT sync, leader election, and versioned file ops
- version: 0.2.0
- language: Rust (edition 2021)
- type: library (not a CLI binary)
- transport: iroh-net (QUIC + NAT traversal)
- sync-protocol: Automerge incremental sync (bloom-filter diff exchange)
- max-file-size: 10MB

## API Entry Point

```rust
let swarm = Swarm::builder()
    .group_id("my-group")
    .storage_path("./data")
    .build()
    .await?;
swarm.start().await?;
```

## KV Operations

- `put(key, value)` → store key-value, CRDT-sync to peers
- `get(key)` → retrieve value (Option)
- `delete(key)` → remove key
- `keys_with_prefix(prefix)` → list keys matching prefix

## Peer Operations

- `node_id()` → this node's ID string
- `node_addr()` → NodeAddr (serialize with serde_json for transport)
- `connect_peer(&NodeAddr)` → connect by full address
- `connect_peer_by_id(node_id_str)` → connect by node ID only
- `connected_peers()` → list connected peer IDs
- `discover_and_connect_local_peers()` → on-demand mDNS scan
- `announce(nickname)` → broadcast presence to group
- `list_announced_peers()` → Vec<PeerInfo> { node_id, nickname, group_id }

## State

- `is_leader()` → bool
- `leader_id()` → Option<String>
- `group_id()` → String
- `state_hash()` → CRDT document hash (first 16 hex chars of heads)

## Lifecycle

- `subscribe()` → broadcast::Receiver<SwarmEvent>
- `shutdown()` → graceful stop

## Events (SwarmEvent)

- `PeerConnected { node_id }` → peer joined
- `PeerDisconnected { node_id }` → peer left
- `DataSynced { key, value }` → single key updated from peer
- `SyncStarted` → bulk sync started
- `SyncCompleted { hash, key_count }` → sync round finished
- `ConflictDetected { file_name, resolver_node, expected_version, current_version }` → file locked
- `ConflictResolved { file_name, resolved_by, new_version }` → file unlocked

## Feature Flags

```toml
default = ["redb-backend"]
sqlite-backend = ["rusqlite"]
redb-backend = ["redb"]
rocksdb-backend = ["rocksdb"]
file-ops = []  # versioned file sync + conflict management
```

## File Operations (feature: file-ops)

- `put_file(path)` → upload with auto-versioning
- `get_file(key, path)` → download latest
- `get_file_version(key, version, path)` → download specific version
- `file_metadata(key)` → FileMetadata { name, size, modified, checksum, version, author }
- `file_history(key)` → Vec<FileVersion> with author/timestamp/operation
- `list_files()` → all files with metadata
- `audit_trail(limit)` → all operations across all files
- `delete_file(key)` → soft-delete

## Conflict Resolution (feature: file-ops)

- `is_file_locked(name)` → bool
- `get_conflict_info(name)` → Option<ConflictInfo>
- `locked_files()` → Vec<ConflictInfo>
- `lock_file(name)` → broadcast lock to peers
- `resolve_conflict(name, resolution)` → KeepLocal / KeepRemote / MergeWith(bytes)

Flow: concurrent write → CRDT conflict → file locked on all nodes →
ConflictDetected event → resolver calls resolve_conflict → ConflictResolved →
file unlocked, sync resumes.

## Architecture

- network.rs: iroh-net endpoint, mDNS, ALPN per group, deterministic dup-connection resolution
- sync.rs: Automerge CRDT, per-peer incremental sync state (SyncMsg), state_hash
- election.rs: Bully algorithm, heartbeat 2s, timeout 5s
- storage.rs: pluggable backends (redb default)
- file.rs: FileOps, versioned storage, conflict lock/unlock/resolve

## Background Tasks (after start())

- Heartbeat (2s)
- Message handler (SyncMsg multi-round exchange)
- Retransmit (1s)
- Peer event forwarder
- Auto-discovery (3s)

## Dependencies

- iroh-net 0.28 (P2P + NAT traversal)
- automerge 0.5 (CRDT + incremental sync)
- redb 2 / rusqlite 0.32 / rocksdb 0.22 (storage)
- tokio, serde, serde_json, bincode, thiserror, chrono, tracing

## Build

```bash
cd crates/murmur && cargo build
cd crates/murmur && cargo test
cd crates/murmur && cargo test --features file-ops
```

## Examples

```bash
cargo run --example basic
cargo run --example group_chat
cargo run --example chat_room
cargo run --example shared_kv
cargo run --example cli_dev_scope
cargo run --example file_sync --features file-ops
cargo run --example benchmark --release
```
